stories.title: Extract LLM provider interface from app.py monolith
acceptance_criteria: LLM provider config moved to src/realtime/llm_provider.py
get_llm_config() returns a typed LLMConfig dataclass
All 7 providers implement the same interface contract
app.py imports from llm_provider module instead of inline config
All existing tests still pass

stories.title: Fix mic cutoff bug with root-cause specification
acceptance_criteria: Root cause identified and documented in specs/buffer_manager.md
VadTranscriber handles partial audio chunks without dropping segments
Test validates audio continuity across chunk boundaries
No regression in existing transcription tests

stories.title: Add WebSocket error handling and reconnection spec
acceptance_criteria: WebSocket connection drop detected within 5 seconds
Client reconnection re-sends transcript history
Server handles half-open connections gracefully
Test validates reconnection preserves coaching state

stories.title: Implement context engine Layer 2 (Hardly Selling transcriptions)
acceptance_criteria: Hardly Selling methodology loaded as retrievable context layer
Context engine selects relevant methodology sections per call phase
Coaching suggestions reference specific Hardly Selling techniques
RAG pipeline supports multi-source retrieval (script + methodology)

stories.title: Optimize latency below 3 seconds for coaching suggestions
acceptance_criteria: End-to-end latency from speech to coaching suggestion < 3 seconds
Streaming LLM responses display incrementally in UI
Latency benchmark test records p50 and p95 measurements
Fallback to faster model if primary model exceeds 5s timeout

stories.title: Meeting notetaker integration via Vexa (self-hosted, open source)
acceptance_criteria: Audio capture works from Zoom or Google Meet calls
Both sides of conversation captured (not just mic)
Integration documented with setup instructions
Privacy/compliance implications documented

stories.title: Security hardening and threat model
acceptance_criteria: Threat model document covers audio data, LLM API keys, WebSocket
API keys loaded from env vars only (no hardcoded secrets)
WebSocket endpoint validates origin header
LLM prompt injection mitigations documented and tested
RAG knowledge base integrity check on startup

stories.title: Overlay UI for desktop (floating coaching widget)
acceptance_criteria: Desktop overlay renders on top of Zoom/Meet window
Coaching suggestions appear without switching windows
Overlay is draggable and resizable
Hotkey to show/hide overlay
